pi_items.source: task.json id field (inventory_internal_transfer@1) and setup_task.sh script naming
setup_task.sh lines 49-56 retrieve main warehouse stock location; transfer_request.txt line 140 references 'FROM: WH/Stock (Main Warehouse)'
setup_task.sh line 59 sets sub_loc_name = 'Quality Inspection Zone'; transfer_request.txt line 141 references 'TO: WH/Stock/Quality Inspection Zone'
setup_task.sh line 137: 'Reference: QC-BATCH-2025-001' in generated transfer_request.txt; export_result.sh lines 89-93 verify this reference
setup_task.sh line 82: product definition with exact name; transfer_request.txt line 145: 'Industrial Safety Helmet - Class E    Qty: 20'
transfer_request.txt line 145 lists 'Qty: 20'; export_result.sh line 103 verifies target_qty = 20 if 'Helmet' in product name
setup_task.sh line 83: product definition with exact name; transfer_request.txt line 146: 'High-Visibility Reflective Vest - XL  Qty: 30'
transfer_request.txt line 146 lists 'Qty: 30'; export_result.sh line 103 verifies target_qty = 30 for non-Helmet products
setup_task.sh line 82: 'init_qty': 50 for Industrial Safety Helmet - Class E
setup_task.sh line 83: 'init_qty': 75 for High-Visibility Reflective Vest - XL
setup_task.sh line 30: DB = 'odoo_demo'; setup_odoo.sh line 11: ODOO_DB_NAME='odoo_demo'
setup_task.sh line 31: USERNAME = 'admin@example.com'; setup_odoo.sh line 12: ADMIN_EMAIL='admin@example.com'
setup_task.sh line 32: PASSWORD = 'admin'; setup_odoo.sh line 13: ADMIN_PASS='admin'
setup_task.sh line 29: URL = 'http://localhost:8069'; setup_odoo.sh line 10: ODOO_URL='http://localhost:8069'

privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic Odoo ERP task involving inventory management. The task requires creating an internal transfer of pre-staged products from the main warehouse stock location (WH/Stock) to a quality inspection sublocation (WH/Stock/Quality Inspection Zone). Two storable products are created with initial inventory: Industrial Safety Helmet - Class E (50 units initial, 20 to transfer) and High-Visibility Reflective Vest - XL (75 units initial, 30 to transfer). The transfer request file specifies reference code QC-BATCH-2025-001 and is generated at /home/ga/Desktop/transfer_request.txt. The Odoo instance runs on localhost:8069 with database 'odoo_demo' using default credentials admin@example.com/admin. All product data, inventory quantities, and locations are synthetically created by the setup script and do not represent real-world data.
